signupData.goalsElaboration: D3 college basketball player, in-season (12 weeks remaining). Need strength training that complements basketball - explosiveness, durability, injury prevention. Can't be too sore for games.
signupData.locationElaboration: University athletic facility - full athletic performance center with platforms, racks, sleds, plyo boxes
signupData.injuries: Chronic ankle instability (tapes for games). Can't be too sore for basketball performance.
signupData.experienceElaboration: 3 years lifting experience. College basketball player (D3), currently in-season. Trains Mon/Thu at 2 PM, 45 min sessions between classes and practice.

onboardingMessages: I play D3 basketball and I'm in-season with 12 weeks left. I need strength training that won't hurt my game performance.
I can only lift Monday and Thursday, 45 minutes between classes and practice. I have access to a full athletic performance center.
I want explosive movements - jump higher, move faster. I tape my ankles for games due to chronic instability.
